headlines: MFA-optional banks leave safe doors (and accounts) wide open for thieves to pillage
C programmers commit fresh crimes against readability
Confidential computing's core trust mechanism is broken. The fix may not exist
NASA says it will isolate volunteers from the outside world for a year
crew_quote: "Well, looks like the banks are leaving their doors wide open, just like the time I left my curry in the fridge too long—only difference is, I didn’t have to worry about thieves!"
